scripts.test: npm run clean:report && npm run cy:run; npm run merge:report && npm run gen:html
scripts.test:category: npm run clean:report && cypress run --spec cypress/e2e/category.cy.js; npm run merge:report && npm run gen:html
scripts.test:template: npm run clean:report && cypress run --spec cypress/e2e/template-attributes.cy.js; npm run merge:report && npm run gen:html
scripts.screenshots:template: cypress run --spec cypress/e2e/template-attributes-screenshots.cy.js --browser chrome --config viewportWidth=1920,viewportHeight=1080 && node scripts/copy-manual-screenshots.js template-attributes-screenshots.cy.js/template-attributes-manual template-attributes
scripts.screenshots:promotions: cypress run --spec cypress/e2e/promotions-screenshots.cy.js --browser chrome --config viewportWidth=1920,viewportHeight=1080 && node scripts/copy-manual-screenshots.js promotions-screenshots.cy.js/promotions-manual promotions
scripts.manual:pdf:template: node scripts/generate-manual-pdf.js เทมเพลตคุณสมบัติ-คู่มือผู้ใช้.md
scripts.manual:pdf:promotions: node scripts/generate-manual-pdf.js โปรโมชั่น-คู่มือผู้ใช้.md
scripts.manual:template: npm run screenshots:template && npm run manual:pdf:template
scripts.manual:promotions: npm run screenshots:promotions && npm run manual:pdf:promotions
scripts.screenshots:free-gifts: cypress run --spec cypress/e2e/free-gifts-screenshots.cy.js --browser chrome --config viewportWidth=1920,viewportHeight=1080 && node scripts/copy-manual-screenshots.js free-gifts-screenshots.cy.js/free-gifts-manual free-gifts
scripts.manual:pdf:free-gifts: node scripts/generate-manual-pdf.js ของแถม-คู่มือผู้ใช้.md
scripts.manual:free-gifts: npm run screenshots:free-gifts && npm run manual:pdf:free-gifts
scripts.screenshots:coupons: cypress run --spec cypress/e2e/coupons-screenshots.cy.js --browser chrome --config viewportWidth=1920,viewportHeight=1080 && node scripts/copy-manual-screenshots.js coupons-screenshots.cy.js/coupons-manual coupons
scripts.manual:pdf:coupons: node scripts/generate-manual-pdf.js คูปอง-คู่มือผู้ใช้.md
scripts.manual:coupons: npm run screenshots:coupons && npm run manual:pdf:coupons
scripts.manual:pdf:template-options: node scripts/generate-manual-pdf.js กลุ่มตัวเลือกMapping-คู่มือผู้ใช้.md
scripts.manual:template-options: npm run screenshots:template-options && npm run manual:pdf:template-options
scripts.manual:pdf:mapping-conditions: node scripts/generate-manual-pdf.js เงื่อนไขความเข้ากันได้-คู่มือผู้ใช้.md
scripts.manual:mapping-conditions: npm run screenshots:mapping-conditions && npm run manual:pdf:mapping-conditions
scripts.test:brand: npm run clean:report && cypress run --spec cypress/e2e/brand.cy.js; npm run merge:report && npm run gen:html
scripts.test:supplier: npm run clean:report && cypress run --spec cypress/e2e/supplier.cy.js; npm run merge:report && npm run gen:html
scripts.test:product: npm run clean:report && cypress run --spec cypress/e2e/product.cy.js; npm run merge:report && npm run gen:html
scripts.test:tag: npm run clean:report && cypress run --spec cypress/e2e/tag.cy.js; npm run merge:report && npm run gen:html
scripts.test:promotions: npm run clean:report && cypress run --spec cypress/e2e/promotions.cy.js; npm run merge:report && npm run gen:html
scripts.test:free-gifts: npm run clean:report && cypress run --spec cypress/e2e/free-gifts.cy.js; npm run merge:report && npm run gen:html
scripts.test:coupons: npm run clean:report && cypress run --spec cypress/e2e/coupons.cy.js; npm run merge:report && npm run gen:html
scripts.test:all: node scripts/organize-test-files.js && node scripts/run-all-module-tests.js && node scripts/build-all-module-csvs.js && npm run dashboard
